With the lastest major patch, the Curiculum premium track was upgraded to provide triple rewards from the daily which is nice. The problem is that bonus(along the ability to rewind turns and use everything in Traphase) is entirely tied to the duration of the battlepass. 

If you buy it on the last day of the battlepass, ~~you literally get no benefit~~ edit: You do get the xp/standard pulls retroactively, but you don't get all the dream verves due to cap. If the battlepass is shortened(like the next one from dec 15th to dec 29th), then you simply get less days for the same price.

I think instead of this system, it should provide something that works like the Moonphase Vigil(subscription) for a set number of days regardless of when you buy it. So you spend money on premium, you always get 28days of triple daillies/rewind/traphase unlocks. Doesn't matter when you buy it or how long the battlepass runs for, you always get 28days so the full value's worth, so it doesn't feel bad to spend on this upgrade if you don't buy it on day1 or if it's shortened.
yeah, the premium track being half value because of the shortened duration is a bit of an odd choice
makes it difficult to justify the cost
yeah i didnt get it cause i joined like....recently and that bp is already half way done.
buying premium track does retroactively give you all the rewards you missed, btw
(except daily globes are still capped at 10 so you'll lose most of those)
but that doesn't mean much with a shortened battle pass where the rewards to miss aren't there to begin with
oh does it? is that mentionned?
not too sure and I can't check since I have it, but iirc it should show you all the rewards on the purchase preview pop up
you mean this will back pay the days? ?
like the dailies reward x3 and stuff
yes, if you buy it midway through a bp season it retroactively grants you all the silver and standard pulls you missed out on
yeah but then if you don't buy it when you unlocked the previous one you also pay 780 instead of 600 which is another questionnable thing tbh
Did they say that the next battle pass price will be the same? Or is it possible that they half the price? I mean, charging full price for half the time would be greedy af

I was doing some testing on my alternate account with a full "Lemuria" team and realized Faros' Exalt shield was the same as I remember it always being. 

Since Faros' Soulforge gives her +100% DMG Amplification with a 4 Lemuria team, I expected it to give an additional +40% boost to her Exalt shield.

Even though I know her talent is only affected by her personally-contributed DMG Amplification stats (of which Soulforge should be a part), I made 2 random teams with exactly the same DMG Amplification stat to check just in case.

As the screenshots show, her shield is identical for +100% DMG Amp full Lemuria team and for the random team. This seems like it's probably a bug.

(I clarified a bit in this message: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1449167728551133234/1449310983632719984)
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Faros "Homesick" shield scaling talent doesn't benefit from her Soulforge

content: Ok, there are different thing that i will list that are missing or not well explained in relation to the **Astral Reign Ruleset**:
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Astral Reign missing Tutorials, Info and Text

content: - **1) **The Text, in relation to the **Prismatic Lens**, is now outdated, it needs to be updated with the new changes from the Anniversary update
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Astral Reign missing Tutorials, Info and Text

content: - **2) ** The **Archive Mark** info, that talk about "Esoteric" and "Occult" Research are only explained by clicking in a small portion of the Team Info, please, put a section for it or point to that in the Tutorial Section.                       Because a person can't normally know that those info are place in there otherwise.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Astral Reign missing Tutorials, Info and Text

content: - **3)** There is no specific entry in the **Tutorial Section for the Astral Reign ruleset**, the only possible mention is the one that talk about the difference in the Chapter rules, but it doesn't specify Where to click to show this changes, and the Astral Rulesets are already present in D-tide and most Events, so a person may just don't know that there are different rules for those at the start.                                                                                               There should be a dedicated section for it, it think, or a way to make sure people know about this and the importance to Unlock and Level up the Astral Realm Talent.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Astral Reign missing Tutorials, Info and Text

content:
This are smaller complains, but:
- **4) **The **Keyflare recharged at the end of the turn** is not "the team average", that seems to indicate the sum of all the Keyflare of the team divided by 4 and then multiplied by 2, when in reality is just the sum of ALL the Keylare of the team just multiplied by 2 
- **5) **The text warns about **the "Gaze" Intention **at turn 6, but it never specify what that those, you have to test it out in game if one want to know
